options.content:
## Continuous profiling (Pyroscope)

CPU flame graph for the **gateway**, pushed by the eBPF profiler. To correlate a *slow request* to a CPU profile: open a slow gateway trace in **Explore → Tempo**, expand a span, and follow **Profiles for this span** (Tempo → Pyroscope `tracesToProfiles`).

The gateway runs on Bun (JavaScriptCore, not V8), so profiles come from eBPF — enable the opt-in profiler with `--profile profiling`. If this panel is empty, the profiler isn't running or your host lacks eBPF/BTF.

panels.description: Gateway CPU time by call stack (eBPF process_cpu profile).
panels.title: Gateway · CPU flame graph
